title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Accenture India in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!
